ideation: This sequence will show the robot adjusting goggles onto its face.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the careful placement of the goggles. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms at rest. Frame 2 shows both arms moving upward. Frame 3 shows the robot positioning the goggles on its face, and frame 4 shows the robot adjusting the goggles on its face. Frame 5 shows the robot's arms returning to a resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
both arms lift slowly, reaching forward
the right arm moves up to the face, left arm supports
arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
